Uses of Class
tif.DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD

  • Packages that use DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD 
    Package Description
    tif
    Classes for parsing and manipulating TIFF-based files.

    • Uses of DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD in tif

      Fields in tif with type parameters of type DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private java.util.Map<java.lang.Integer,DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD> DirectoryIFD.entryMap 
      Methods in tif that return DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD DirectoryIFD.getEntry(int tagID)
      Retrieves an entry by its raw numeric ID.
      DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD DirectoryIFD.getTagEntry(Taggable tag)
      Retrieves the EntryIFD associated with the numerical ID of the specified tag.
      Methods in tif that return types with arguments of type DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.util.Iterator<DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD> DirectoryIFD.iterator()
      Retrieves an iterator to navigate through a collection of EntryIFD objects.
      Methods in tif with parameters of type DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void DirectoryIFD.add(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Adds a new EntryIFD entry to the collection.
      boolean DirectoryIFD.contains(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Checks if the specified EntryIFD entry has been added to this directory.
      static java.util.Date TagValueConverter.getDate(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Extracts a Date object from an entry if a date hint is present.
      static double[] TagValueConverter.getDoubleArray(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as a double array.
      static double TagValueConverter.getDoubleValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as a scalar double.
      static float[] TagValueConverter.getFloatArray(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as a float array.
      static float TagValueConverter.getFloatValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as a scalar float.
      static int[] TagValueConverter.getIntArray(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as an integer array.
      static int[] TagValueConverter.getIntArray2(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Deprecated. 
      static int TagValueConverter.getIntValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as an integer.
      static long[] TagValueConverter.getLongArray(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as a long array.
      static long TagValueConverter.getLongValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as a long.
      static RationalNumber[] TagValueConverter.getRationalArray(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as an array of RationalNumber objects.
      static RationalNumber TagValueConverter.getRationalValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Returns the value as a single RationalNumber instance.
      static java.time.ZonedDateTime TagValueConverter.getZonedDateTime(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Parses the entry data into a ZonedDateTime object.
      private static void TiffDatePatcher.processExifGpsTimeStamp(ImageRandomAccessWriter writer, DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry, java.time.ZonedDateTime zdt)
      Patches the binary GPS time-stamp in-place using a sequence of three 64-bit rational numbers.
      private static void TiffDatePatcher.processExifSegment(ImageRandomAccessWriter writer, DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry, java.time.ZonedDateTime zdt)
      Patches ASCII-formatted date tags in-place.
      private static void TiffDatePatcher.processXmpSegment(ImageRandomAccessWriter writer, DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry, java.time.ZonedDateTime zdt, boolean xmpDump)
      Performs a binary-safe search and replace within an XMP XML packet.
      boolean DirectoryIFD.remove(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Removes a EntryIFD entry from this directory.
      private static java.lang.Number TagValueConverter.toNumericValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Validates and returns the entry data as a Number.
      static java.lang.String TagValueConverter.toStringValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry)
      Converts an DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry into a human-readable string.
